aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: When edge cases arise, choose the more specific and potentially uncomfortable rendering if it is character-true and causally necessary. Intimacy, bodily risk, and moral compromise must be shown with concrete detail and aftermath, then integrated into later behavior rather than quarantined as a one-scene shock.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a draft abstracts pain, sex, coercion, blood, or economic shame at the exact moment consequence should be embodied, revise by replacing summary with physically and socially specific action tied to POV stakes.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid generic endurance slogans, tidy confessional monologues, and broad declarations that summarize emotion instead of locating it in specific action.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Concrete domestic and weather-linked language, with attention to weight, heat, fabric, and cost rather than abstract feeling terms.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: More incisive and unsentimental, with flashes of dry wit and precise bodily memory when fear spikes.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low in public; in private anger she uses sparse, hard profanity with deliberate force.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Measured, courteous working-class politeness that avoids spectacle and rarely claims the floor first.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: When threatened she over-specifies practical tasks, then drops into sudden silence once she reaches the emotional edge she cannot narrate.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Begins cautiously, then adds clarifying clauses as if revising herself in real time; under strain she shortens to blunt declaratives.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid saintly self-sacrifice speeches, quirky one-liner caricature, and anachronistic therapeutic jargon.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Tactile, kitchen, and devotional imagery used in lived-in ways, never as decorative heritage display.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Quick, sensuous, and sharply appraising; tenderness and defiance can coexist in the same beat.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate and situational; profanity rises when cornered or protecting someone.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Warm, neighborly, and socially deft, using humor to reduce conflict and keep conversation moving.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Laughter thins into clipped directives; she may invoke prayer fragments ironically or defensively depending on who is listening.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Rhythmic turns with interruptions and rhetorical pivots; she can jump from joking cadence to blunt clarity without transition.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid cartoon-villain threats, monologues of pure self-justification, and simplistic drunk-man dialogue loops.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Betting, transport, and shift-work references; practical slang used to mask vulnerability.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Defensive, shame-driven, and evasive, with sudden pleading when consequences become concrete.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: High in male social settings; less profane when he needs sympathy.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Matey, performative confidence with pub-tested banter and deflection through jokes.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Repeats reassurance formulas, bargains in smaller and smaller units, and overuses familiarity terms to regain control.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Starts in fragments and anecdotes, dodges direct answers, then lunges into emphatic promises when pressed.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid melodramatic patriarch speeches and modern buzzword abuse language that breaks period authenticity.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Administrative and accounting metaphors that frame love, duty, and care as ledgers and obligations.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Exacting and punitive; politeness hardens into verbal control when he feels status slipping.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low baseline, but when control fails he uses sparse, cutting obscenity aimed at humiliation.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Controlled, respectable, and schoolroom-correct, with careful diction meant to signal authority.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Becomes more grammatically formal right before emotional rupture, then snaps into targeted contempt.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Complete sentences as commands; legalistic qualifiers and moral bookkeeping language shape his arguments.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid mystical motherhood platitudes and omniscient healer pronouncements.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Body-specific, procedural language grounded in touch, timing, and risk thresholds.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Dry, unsentimental, and compassionate without sentimentality.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Moderate and workplace-coded; profanity appears when systems fail patients.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Brisk clinical reassurance anchored in practical instruction.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Slows her cadence to sequence tasks, names concrete steps out loud, and refuses speculative reassurance.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Short imperative chains during emergencies; fuller explanatory sentences when gaining consent.

character_voice_profiles.forbidden_generic_lines: Avoid savior dialogue, plot-device exposition, and generic wise-neighbor aphorisms.
character_voice_profiles.lexical_signature: Infrastructure and electrical repair language used as grounded metaphor, never ornamental flourish.
character_voice_profiles.private_register: Grief-muted but ethically attentive, speaking most when practical action is required.
character_voice_profiles.profanity_profile: Low to moderate; plain speech under stress rather than theatrical swearing.
character_voice_profiles.public_register: Reserved civil-service politeness that avoids intrusion.
character_voice_profiles.stress_tells: Answers with offers rather than opinions, and redirects conflict toward immediate solvable tasks.
character_voice_profiles.syntax_signature: Compact declaratives with occasional unexpectedly lyrical weather observations.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High by default for spoken lines; uncontracted forms are marked choices for period formality, emphasis, or character-specific control behavior.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate structural engines across adjacent chapters: ensemble social scenes, inventory chapters, information-turn chapters, acted-upon pressure chapters, and aftermath chapters. Vary scene count (2 to 4), dialogue density, and interiority depth so consecutive chapters do not share the same pacing signature.
prose_style_profile.diction: Period-authentic but readable contemporary English, favoring concrete nouns and precise verbs over lyrical abstraction.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third person, alternating primarily between Elsie and Noreen, with occasional tightly limited deviations only when causal clarity requires it.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Sentence rhythm should alternate compressed pressure bursts with longer observational lines that carry social texture; avoid monotone paragraph cadence.
